Description:
Ballistics of APFSDS-T rounds fired from Type 86 high-pressure smoothbore anti-tank gun. Type 86 mates carriage of Type 73 with barrel built using hydraulic autofrettage and is compatible with all ammo of Type 73 and Type 69. 

This entry represents the following ballistics (uncheck "Constrain Design" first):

Projectiles		Mass	Velocity		P.mcp
		kg	m/s		MPa
Tungsten		5.3	1610		15°C	451.1	[copper crusher gauge] 
Carbide						505	[piezoelectric]
					50°C	524.3	[copper crusher gauge]
Depleted		5.56	1580
Uranium

Charge:
6.67 kg	5.77 kg	15/19 Rosette high-nitration graphite-coated nitrocellulose 
		(1050,000 kgf-dm/kg, also given as 1047 kJ/kg, 3075 K, 13.2% nitration, 1-2% Diphenylamine)
		Web 1.43-1.53 mm, Perf. Dia. 0.3-0.6 mm, Length 9.0-14.0 mm  (L/D ~1).
	0.9 kg	combustible cartridge 
		(730,000 kgf-dm/kg) 
Chambrage:
1.42 estimated

Factory test: 1630 m/s @ 450.8 MPa 
Acceptance test: 1610 m/s @ 451.1 MPa w/ additional graphite coating.

References:
- 梁禾，芮兰德《86式100滑高膛压反坦克炮研制的回顾》国营247厂
- 张树权 《86式100mm高膛压滑膛反坦克炮钨、铀合金脱壳穿甲弹的研究》国营803厂
- 陈忠，谭泸生《86式100滑主装药高氮量单基药的研制》国营845厂
- 《火炮内弹道计算手册》王连荣，张佩勤，国防工业出版社，1987
